hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"; rel="${f#$root/}"; img="$(sed -n 's/^BUN_IMAGE ?= //p' "$root/Makefile")"; docker run --rm -v "$root:/app" -w /app "$img" bunx biome check --write "$rel"; } 2>/dev/null || true
